economic_notes: First Nation holds 99.96% interest in Second Wind Power LP (electric power generation). Holds 5.99% interest in Tomahawk Energy Services LP via Ocean Man Developments LP. Subsequent event: acquired 3,125,000 warrant certificates in Buffalo Potash at cost of $425,000.
notes: Audit is qualified due to missing budget comparison information (disclosure omission only, no effect on reported amounts). Funds held in trust of $7,654,917 (Ottawa Trust Fund) included in financial assets. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Second Wind Power LP and Second Wind Power Inc. Four entities fully consolidated: Ocean Man First Nation Housing Authority, Lost Horse Hills Ranch Inc. (Oct 31 year-end), Ocean Man Developments Inc. (inactive), Ocean Man Developments LP. Treaty Land Entitlement loan of $106,903 classified as current liability. ISC funding per reconciliation note used ($5,198,762). Total government transfers includes ISC ($5,198,762) plus CMHC ($175,460) = $5,374,222; however CMHC subsidy received for housing loan payments is also included making total $5,508,722 if CMHC receivable subsidy included. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC and CMHC amounts.
